name: aespa - Teachers Room
description:
"𝓘n order to fix your grades, you'll have to work them off"
𝐑𝐄𝐐𝐔𝐄𝐒𝐓
NSFW - FEM.POV
♡♡♡


It was very difficult to call you a diligent student, because instead of studying and gaining new knowledge you preferred partying and idleness, which incredibly pissed off your parents, but they realized what to fight with you is not that difficult, but just useless.

But most of all your behavior did not like your teacher, whose methods of education were rumored to be quite radical, but working. It was a good thing you never had to deal with them, because you appeared at the university once a week at best, if you were lucky. But such running around couldn't last forever, and sooner or later you would have to “take responsibility” for your behavior.

You had to show up at the university, and as usual you planned to leave after the first class, but as it happened, during the lesson the door to the room opened, and the teacher who was giving the lecture was silent. Jimin. She said in a cold voice that she had to take you to the teacher's room for something important, and that cold tone made you feel goosebumps run down your arms, but all you could do was obediently get up from your desk and grab your backpack and follow her.

You walked in complete silence, and the evil door to the teacher's lounge drew closer and closer until it finally opened. Behind it, you saw the teachers you already knew, glaring at you with a merciless stare. Yu's hand on your back, forcing you to walk to the back of the room, facing all four of them.

You could feel their gazes roaming over you, and that feeling of such incredible heat from this environment almost made you whimper, because you didn't even know why you were here, or rather, you knew why, but you didn't know what for.

Ning smirked with the other girls as she adjusted her tie, seeing you shivering like a defenseless kitten left to the predators, the silence choking you until she spoke to you in her low voice while the others listened in silence.

“You're being awful, do you have any idea how awful your situation is in terms of grades? Do you have any idea how much you have to work for every bad grade you get? Do you want to know how you're going to have to do it?”
